TagList.description: A list of tags as key-value pairs.

CacheSecurityGroup.description:
Represents the output of one of the following operations:

  • AuthorizeCacheSecurityGroupIngress

  • CreateCacheSecurityGroup

  • RevokeCacheSecurityGroupIngress

ProcessedUpdateActions.description: Update actions that have been processed successfully

UnprocessedUpdateActions.description: Update actions that haven't been processed successfully

ProcessedUpdateActions.description: Update actions that have been processed successfully

UnprocessedUpdateActions.description: Update actions that haven't been processed successfully

ReplicationGroup.description: Contains all of the attributes of a specific Valkey or Redis OSS replication group.

ServerlessCacheSnapshot.description: The response for the attempt to copy the serverless cache snapshot. Available for Valkey, Redis OSS and Serverless Memcached only.

Snapshot.description: Represents a copy of an entire Valkey or Redis OSS cluster as of the time when the snapshot was taken.

CacheCluster.description: Contains all of the attributes of a specific cluster.

CacheSecurityGroup.description:
Represents the output of one of the following operations:

  • AuthorizeCacheSecurityGroupIngress

  • CreateCacheSecurityGroup

  • RevokeCacheSecurityGroupIngress

CacheSubnetGroup.description:
Represents the output of one of the following operations:

  • CreateCacheSubnetGroup

  • ModifyCacheSubnetGroup

GlobalReplicationGroup.description:
Consists of a primary cluster that accepts writes and an associated secondary cluster that resides in a different Amazon region. The secondary cluster accepts only reads. The primary cluster automatically replicates updates to the secondary cluster.

  • The GlobalReplicationGroupIdSuffix represents the name of the Global datastore, which is what you use to associate a secondary cluster.

ReplicationGroup.description: Contains all of the attributes of a specific Valkey or Redis OSS replication group.

ServerlessCache.description: The response for the attempt to create the serverless cache.

ServerlessCacheSnapshot.description: The state of a serverless cache snapshot at a specific point in time, to the millisecond. Available for Valkey, Redis OSS and Serverless Memcached only.

Snapshot.description: Represents a copy of an entire Valkey or Redis OSS cluster as of the time when the snapshot was taken.

Status.description: Indicates the user status. Can be "active", "modifying" or "deleting".

MinimumEngineVersion.description: The minimum engine version required, which is Redis OSS 6.0

AccessString.description: Access permissions string used for this user.

UserGroupIds.description: Returns a list of the user group IDs the user belongs to.

Authentication.description: Denotes whether the user requires a password to authenticate.

ARN.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the user.

UserIds.description: The list of user IDs that belong to the user group.

MinimumEngineVersion.description: The minimum engine version required, which is Redis OSS 6.0

PendingChanges.description: A list of updates being applied to the user group.

ReplicationGroups.description: A list of replication groups that the user group can access.

ServerlessCaches.description: Indicates which serverless caches the specified user group is associated with. Available for Valkey, Redis OSS and Serverless Memcached only.

ARN.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the user group.
